club.name: LAHORE TOASTMASTERS CLUB - 01214038
club.vision: We empower individuals to become more effective communicators and leaders.
club.mission: We provide a supportive and positive learning experience in which members are empowered to develop communication and leadership skills, resulting in greater self-confidence and personal growth.
club.location: WORK by Kickstart Co-Working, 8-A New Muslim Town, Canal Road, Lahore
club.meeting_days: We meet 1st and 3rd Saturday of the month at 3:00 PM
club.social_connect: Our club is very active on social media. We post regular updates on LinkedIn, Facebook, and Instagram. Search for "Lahore Toastmasters Club" and follow us on your favorite social media channel.
